---
species: "Botryllus schlosseri"
accepted_code: "BOSC"
alternate_codes: # "tunicate_BOSC" 
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "golden star tunicate"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "white zooids, outlined in yellow, forming star-shaped systems. Individual zooidscan be 1.75 mm - 5 mm long." 
image: '/header_images/Botryllus_schlosseri image .jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Joel Sartore (https://www.joelsartore.com/inv006-00008/)' 
categories:
  - tunicates
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
    - lsw_videos
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 35000901
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 103862
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
white zooids, outlined in yellow, forming star-shaped systems.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=103862)
